workload: WCOJ baseline lanes for triangle, four-clique, q6, and q7 motifs

repo_state.notes: No bundled graph dataset was present in repos/dataflow-join, so runtime measurements stayed blocked.

metrics.key_question: Can the checked-out WCOJ examples provide runtime baselines for triangle, four-clique, q6, and q7?
metrics.option_implication: WCOJ remains a follow-up component experiment; this checkout only proves the examples compile without a graph dataset.
metrics.limitation_summary: Compile-only baseline; runtime probes are blocked on missing graph inputs.
limitations: semantic/freshness/barrier fields are null because this lane is a baseline build/run probe, not an evaluation of query results.
The examples require graph input paths; without a local dataset, only compile and failure-mode evidence was measurable.

runs.observed: Example suite compiled successfully after dependency resolution.
Panicked while opening the graph input file because the example treats the final positional argument as a dataset path.
Panicked on missing required filename/argument before any graph data could be loaded.

summary.baseline_state: compile-only baseline with blocked runtime measurement
summary.option_implication: The lane is ready for real triangle/four-clique/q6/q7 measurements once a local graph dataset is supplied.
